pr-evidence/pep621-packaging-metadata/pr.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 focused review returned no findings for the PEP 621 metadata, optional dependency, script, and governance-test changes.
verification: Inspected built wheel METADATA for name/version/requires-python/extras/Requires-Dist pins and entry_points.txt for document-kv and restaurant-kv script aliases.
what_changed: Moved package name, version, description, readme, authors, keywords, classifiers, Python requirement, optional dependencies, and console scripts to PEP 621 project tables.
Kept Poetry-specific package/include configuration under tool.poetry for the src layout and bundled Databricks templates.
Updated governance tests to collect exact pins from project optional dependencies and reject deprecated tool.poetry metadata, dependency, extras, and script tables.
Updated public package metadata tests to validate project metadata and project script aliases.
pr-evidence/pep621-packaging-metadata/pr.why: Open-source packaging should publish standard PEP 621 metadata without Poetry deprecation warnings while preserving exact dependency pins and existing document/legacy console scripts.
